reasoning: XLK +2.3% and XLF +2.3% both outperforming SPY +1.28%, while XLE -0.89% lags. Classic risk-on rotation: tech and financials leading, energy down. Broad-based breadth confirms sustainable upside, not narrow tech-only move. Strong sector alignment supports bullish bias heading into market open.
key_observations: XLK +2.3%: Tech leadership with 110 bps outperformance vs SPY
XLF +2.3%: Financials equally strong, reinforces broad rally, not tech-concentrated
XLE -0.89%: Energy down sharply—confirms risk-on rotation away from defensive hedges
